name: com.jbltx.ugas
description: Unity reference implementation of the UGAS gameplay specification. Provides the four pillars (Attributes, Gameplay Tags, Gameplay Effects, Gameplay Abilities) plus a Gameplay Controller, authored as ScriptableObjects and run by a MonoBehaviour controller. Spec packs (schemas/genre entities) are imported into assets by an editor ScriptedImporter. Includes an optional DOTS/Burst-accelerated backend. See https://github.com/jbltx/ugas for the specification.
